segment-text: TeaTime Pictures
Copyright 2021 Cooper Raiff. All rights reserved. "Orchard" by LVL UP begins.
INT. PARK RIDGE MARRIOTT GRAND BALLROOM (2011) - NIGHT

Lights up on ANDREW (12) falling in love for the first time. We're in slow-mo. We're at a Bar Mitzvah party. The girl he's falling in love with isn't in his grade. It's BELLA (30), the party's hired Motivational Dancer. Bella is thankful for his warmth and attention, but he's 4'10". Front credits appear over a SERIES OF SHOTS (not in slow-mo): - Limbo contest. Bella provides commentary on the mic. - Kids get their white sunglasses and glow necklaces. - A nervous boy slow dances with a nervous girl. They're both wearing white sunglasses and blushing like crazy. - A fun, nerdy group of seven is at the Airbrush Station. Mr. Airbrush writes "Scintillating Seven" on a hat. The friends crack up. They think it's the funniest thing ever. - All the kids watch a montage video of the Bat Mitzvah girl growing up with all her friends. Andrew is looking around. He discreetly stands up and goes to the hallway. - Andrew sees Bella on the phone and hides behind a column so she won't see him. Bella is really sad. She wipes tears and talks quietly. After hanging up, she gets back into work mode and walks back to the party. Andrew goes unseen. Back to the opening slow motion shot. He fell in love because she was sad. "Orchard" reshapes into "Cha Cha Slide" and we're in real time again. WIDE of Bella leading the dance. The song ends. Bella high fives kids. Andrew comes up.
You're a great dancer.
You are too. I'm Andrew.
Andrew has his hand out. Bella shakes it and tries to control her big smile. I'm Bella.

"Stanky Legg" is now playing. Bella goes back to work. Andrew's body is vibrating and on fire. He walks to an adult table where MOM (38) is telling a random parent a story with animated hands. DAD (40) is holding a very sleepy DAVID (3).
Hey honey.
Can we talk in the hall?
INT. HALLWAY OF MARRIOTT (2011) - NIGHT
Everything okay?
I'm in love Mom.
Mom quickly turns into Andrew's 7th grade confidante.
Shut up. Who? Bella.
Mom doesn't recognize the name.
The girl leading the dances. Uh oh.
I know she's old, but I think she's in love with me too.
Okay.. Are you sure babe? Yes.
EXT. PARKING LOT OF PARK RIDGE MARRIOTT (2011) - NIGHT
Families trickle out of the hotel. Andrew trails his family. He's sweaty and his eyes are on Bella talking to adults by her Honda Fit. He builds courage as the adults tell her bye.
I'll be right back. What?
I'll meet you in the car.
Where are youANDREW -Just go to the car please.
Mom sees where he's headed. It's too late. Nothing she can do but be there for him after.
EXT. BY BELLA'S HONDA FIT (2011) - CONTINUOUS
Bella?
Andrew! Superstar! Hi.
You and I worked up a sweat tonight huh?
Yeah-. Um.. Do you think we- will I see you again?
Oh you'll for sure see me again. Your grade has tons of Jews.
True. But I mean like maybe for a date.. I know I'm young but we can lu- I mean- sorry we can- justlike-. Sorry -I'm really nervous.
Well this is the most flattered I've ever felt.
Andrew has to swallow.
But .. .. I'm old5
INT. CAR ON HIGHWAY (2011) - NIGHT
Andrew looks fine at the moment. Mom keeps subtly glancing back. After a few beats, Andrew's face twists. Mom takes her seatbelt off and climbs to the back.
What the hell are you doing?
My baby's heartbroken.

"Clear Bones" by Jean Dawson fades in. Andrew tries fighting his tears at first, but then eventually buries his face in Mom's arms. "Clear Bones" continues as we go to black. Then we see "TEN YEARS LATER"
INT. TULANE HOUSE PARTY - NIGHT

Lights up on ANDREW (22) dancing on a raised surface with another COLLEGE BOY. We're in slow-mo. "Clear Bones" is still playing non-diegetically. He pulls MAYA (22) up with him. Close-ups show the college house party details you remember.
INT. LAUNDRY ROOM AT TULANE PARTY - NIGHT

No more slow-mo. Andrew and Maya make out by the toilet. Maya puts cocaine on the counter. Andrew drinks from his water bottle labeled "vodka". Maya snorts us into diegetic "Clear Bones" playing through the wall.
Are you gonna give up cocaine as a Fulbright Scholar?
Yes. ... What are you gonna do? Kiss you.
After college. Kiss you.
Answer my question.
I did. I'm coming with you.
Stop. That's not funny.
I wanna come to Barcelona with you.
That would cost you money you don't have. And that's not good for us. And I don't wanna be sad right now.
Maya tears up. Andrew holds his tears back as Maya head-butts his heart. Andrew goes under her shirt to grab her back.
You're fine. It's fine. I'm sorry I said that, I'm drunk. .. You okay?
Maya nods and squeezes him. We go from a wide to an extreme, blurry close-up of Andrew's POV of Maya's hair resting on her neck. We pull back when they do. Maya looks in his eyes.
What are you gonna do?
I am gonna go home and find a great nonprofit to work at.
INT. SUBWAY - DAY
Andrew is making a smelly sandwich for a SMELLY GUY (33).
INT. MOM AND STEPDAD GREG'S HOME - NIGHT
Andrew, Mom (48), DAVID (12), and STEPDAD GREG (60) are sitting down for dinner and serving themselves.
You ask your brother about tonight? No I forgot.
Ask what?
To take me to a Bat Mitzvah party.
Well where is it little punk? STEPDAD GREG Space Events in Englewood.
Thank you little punk.
It's Cath's daughter, Pheeb, Macy's sister. Cath hates me right now so I'm skipping. I sent money thoughANDREW -Is Macy in town?
Yeah I talked to her at the service and told her you're here. You should go. She'd be thrilled.
Would that cramp your style? No.
You have a crush on Macy's sister? No.
If she looks anything like her sister you're a fuckin' liar.
Language buddy.
He doesn't have crushes,
It's fine Greg, I'm 12.
he's got a girlfriend.
Shut up. Puberty and a girlfriend?? (red) Yes.
(big smile) ...Margaret.
Sweetie! Marga-Oh my god! Fuck off!
Nuh-uh. No Andrew. We're not in a Tulane dormitory right now.
Sorry. You're right. We're in a 60 year old's bachelor pad, no cursing-I'm kidding! I'm kidding... My mom did a great job after moving in.. (smiling, smooth, to Mom) Why does Cathy hate you?
I had a moment last weekSTEPDAD GREG -Your mother had a manic episode. .
... Greg I feel like your purpose on earth is to make things weird.
David and Mom laugh. Andrew was being funny but he meant it.
EXT. PARKING LOT OUTSIDE SPACE EVENTS - NIGHT
Andrew and David walk up looking fly. MACY (22) meets them.
I can't believe you're crashing my
little sister's Bat Mitzvah.
I know - I didn't even go to the service. I'm just here 'cause my mom is skipping and David needs a family member with him at all timesDAVID -That's not trueANDREW -I'm teasing.
Is your mom okay?
--Um yeah I think so- I didn't really hear what happened.
Neither did I really.

She's okay I think. Is Cath okay is the more important questionMACY -Cath is great. She loves your mom. My mom loves every mom minus this young, crazy one who subs at Newark and ~ostensibly~ fucked Mr. Charlebois in the cafeteria bathrDAVID -Mr. Charlebois our principal?
..-Oh my god I forgot you were here. Oh my god I keep forgetting I'm around kids.
INT. GAME THEMED BAT MITZVAH AT SPACE EVENTS - NIGHT
David runs off with PRETEENS.
So do you have a job or areANDREW -Oh man are we gonna talk about jobs at the Bat Mitzvah?
Should we not?
I mean your call but I feel like we should just get drunk and party with our siblings' friends tonight.
There's so much booze at this kid party you wouldn't believe.
Whadduyoumean kid party!? Your sister's a whole ass woman now-Trueeee12
INT. GAME THEMED BAR - NIGHT
-Andrew and Macy are in line next to a giant Jenga set as well as a Jumbo 4-to-Score Game Set.
Pheeb starting off strong with the innocuous game theme.

It was gonna be "Under the Sea with Pheeb" but she had to call a last minute audible because her bitch friend Gigi Silverman is obsessed with Little Mermaid and forced her to change it. Remember my theme?
Rihanna, right? You did blackfaceMACY -Stop! Actually stop! Are you talking about the banner of my faceANDREW -photoshopped into a picture of Rihanna, yeah, blackface, right?
My parents are dumb and I've had all the evidence of that scrubbed.
I'm just glad your sister learned from your mistakes.
Wait so this is that crazy mom.
-Andrew sees DOMINO (32) enter with LOLA (14). Domino gauges where to sit. Lola has a 15x15 Rubik's Cube by her side.
I see a high schooler with a massive Rubik's Cube standing next
-That's a mom and her kid.
So she was like a tween mom maybe. The kid is in David and Phoebe's grade. Puberty sucks. Also, she's autistic or something like that so I think the mom had her start school late.
I hate this for both of them.
Cath thinks she smokes crack.
The autistic girl?
Vodka cranberry please.
And a sazerac please.
MACY (CONT'D) Fuh(!)-Family Grand Entrance.
Macy goes off. Andrew watches Domino and Lola sit at a table in the back. Domino takes hefty headphones out of her bag.
So just the sazerac?
Ladies and Gentlemen!!
I'll take her vodka cran. DJ RICH (INTO MIC) (CONT'D) Get on your feet!!
So both? Sazeracs strong. DJ RICH (INTO MIC) (CONT'D) Accompanied by mom and dad
Yeah I just graduated college and I'm missing the parties so I'm about to really lean
into this Bat Mitzvah party.
DJ RICH (INTO MIC) (CONT'D)

PHOEBE WITHEILER!!! Andrew cheers loud. DJ RICH (35) comes out from behind his huge DJ setup with his mic as the family runs out to meet him on the dance floor. Phoebe is pumped. Andrew looks back at the headphones on Domino and Lola's table. Then he watches Domino scan the party as Lola works on her Rubik's Cube.
DJ RICH (INTO MIC) (CONT'D)
I say "Mazel" you say "TOV"! MAZEL.
EVERYBODY
Hey have some fun and make some
Rich memories!!! My name is DJ Rich-Andrew fake gags.
INT. WITH ANDREW 20 FEET FROM PRETEEN BOYS' CORNER - NIGHT 13

A bad rap song plays. DJ Rich tries to get kids on the dance floor to no avail. Andrew hates this for Phoebe. Two friends of Phoebe try to get her to dance but it lasts for a second. CATH (50) dances and it's just weird. Andrew's eyes are on the Preteen Boys' Corner. He hatches a plan then walks over.
Boys, what's going on over here? We not gonna boogie at some point? (to David) Don't you have a girlfriend you should be dancing with?
I don't really talk to her.
Great. What about you man seem like a real shot of life why aren't you on the dance floor? Can you not dance?
Andrew is talking to RODRIGO (12). He's all of 4'6".
I can dance, this music just sucks.
What song would get you dancing?
"Mood" by 24kGoldn.
Okay. So funny enough, that's actually my favorite song. If I get the DJ to play it you'll dance?
Yeah that'd be so hype.
INT. DJ STATION - NIGHT
Mr. DJ Rich I need you to play
"Mood" by 24kGoldn after this song.
There's zero people on the dance floor. And I just got some fun kids to promise they'll dance if "Mood" comes on. Then I'm gonna tell
parents Bruno Mars is coming next.
Bruno Mars is later too man-Why?
I don't want Phoebe getting upset.
Okay fair let's ask her. Andrew dials Macy. She answers fast because she was on insta.
Hey can you get your sis and come over here? We're hatching a plan.
LATER. Andrew huddles Macy, Phoebe, and DJ Rich like it's a basketball timeout.
So the hard thing about having the first Bat Mitzvah party is nobody knows how to play it yet. So here's my plan. Tell me what we think.
INT. SMALL TABLE CLOSE TO A BACK ENTRANCE - CONTINUOUS
Lola hands Domino her completed 15x15 Rubik's Cube.
I think that's enough. Nice job but no more scrambling for me... Do you want me to beat you in Tic-tac-toe, or would you like to mingle some, or do you wanna head home?
You are not going to beat me.
I think I'm gonna beat you.
"Mood" comes on. Boys yell. Domino turns as boys run to the dance floor. Lola watches groups of girls walk over to coolly dance. Domino watches her kid. Lola starts Tic-tac-toe.
INT. TABLE OF JEWISH PARENT-TEACHERS AND GRANDPA - CONTINUOUS
Andrew approaches the table. Cath stands up for a hug. Hi honey.
Hi Ms. Cathy. Long time no see.
I wish your mom was here.
I'll tell her you said that.
Please do. Do you have a job yet?
Your daughter asked me that too. I don't have a good answer. But I will say- you don't have a party starter here, so I'm gonna be your guy. Free of charge.
We thought DJ Rich would be enough.
Well clearly he's not if you peeped the dance floor before this. But we're good now. Table 4 I have a question: Do we like Bruno Mars?
Because DJ Rich is about to play
dance floor dancing to it so Phoebe
We can get behind that. Right?
-Honey you had us all at "Table 4 I have a question"-
We can what? What'd you say?
Get behind that!
GRANDPA WHO CAN'T HEAR
Kids were told no grinding so no getting behind anything.
Laughter.
Are you a good dancer?
I'm a great dancer. CHEEKY MOM Alright I'll gather up my dollar CHEEKY MOM (CONT'D) bills and bring-
-Cynthia! No!
"Mood" ends and "24K Magic" starts playing.
INT. SMALL TABLE CLOSE TO A BACK ENTRANCE - CONTINUOUS 18pt1
In the middle of Tic-tac-toe. Lola loves Bruno Mars.
Wait uh oh is this is our song? ... We shouldn't go dance should we?
We definitely should not do that.
What if you put your headphones on and danced with me?
That would be totally embarrassing. Nobody is dancing with their mother or with headphones on.
Hey um do you two dance?
Domino looks at Lola hoping this cute older boy will change her mind. Lola just looks very anxious though.
Sometimes we do. We're not feeling it right now, but maybe in a bit.
Amazing. Well yeah no rush, but tonight is the night, so.
What night?
(to Lola) D'you say "what night"?
No I did not. My mother did.
Oh. What's your mother's name?
Her name is Domino.
(still about Lola) Hi Domino I'm Andrew. Hi Andrew.
(to Lola) Can I ask your name?
Lola? That's my favorite name.
My mother, Domino, named me.
Okay well, Domino, to answer your question- wait what was your question?
You said tonight's the night and I asked what night.
Oh. It's the night you and Lola dance your butts off.
He eyes Lola. She's smiling/blushing. So is Domino actually.
No rush at all. There's no hurry. Just know that no one's gonna have as much fun dancing until you guys are on the dance floor.

Andrew fake moon walks (because he doesn't know how to actually moon walk) to the dance floor, facing Lola and Domino the whole time. All three of them are grinning big time. "24K Magic" gets louder. SERIES OF SHOTS:
INT. SPACE EVENTS - GAME THEMED BAT MITZVAH - DANCE FLOOR
Andrew, 12-year-olds, Macy, and parents dance their butts off. Andrew does a signature dance move with David, who then locks eyes with his very impressed girlfriend, MARGARET (12).
INT. SPACE EVENTS - GAME THEMED BAT MITZVAH - DANCE FLOOR
Andrew leads everybody in a dance he made up. He tells Jewish Grandfathers he loves their effort.
INT. SPACE EVENTS - GAME THEMED BAR - NIGHT
Andrew and Macy and parents do a round of shots.
INT. SPACE EVENTS - GAME THEMED BAT MITZVAH - DANCE FLOOR
Andrew dances on a raised surface with Macy. He pulls Phoebe up with them. Everybody follows Andrew's lead.
INT. SPACE EVENTS - GAME THEMED BAT MITZVAH - DANCE FLOOR
Hora. Andrew is elated watching Phoebe in the chair. He tells the old lady next to him that "Phoebe is a woman!!!"
INT. SPACE EVENTS - GAME THEMED BAT MITZVAH - DANCE FLOOR -19
DJ Rich leads a game of Snowball (slow dance game). The kids are all anxious messes.
INT. IN LINE AT GAME THEMED BAR - CONTINUOUS
Andrew gets in line behind Domino. Hey.
Hi. What are you getting?
Anything that'll give me some
courage to ask Lola to slow dance.
You're very sweet. She won't dance it's okay.
Domino looks at Lola in the distance. So does Andrew. Lola is working on her Rubik's cube while her peers are slow dancing.
Lola's autistic. That's why she's
working on her cube at the Bat
party is game themed.
Is that hard?
Sure. Yeah.. Not because of her..
Domino looks around the party, eyes welling. Andrew gets it.
I'm sorry. ...Sometimes I think I might be a little autistic. You do?
... Well no-.
.. Domino smiles big then laughs. Andrew smiles.
That wasn't real.-- --I don't know-I do think I can get her on the dance floor though.
(thinks he's a cutie) --You were just trying to connect--
I'd give you a thousand dollars.
Like bet me a thousand dollars??
No I'll just give it to you.
Well that's no fun. How about I bet you 300 dollars she dances with me?
I give you 300 if you win and you give me 100 if I win so it's fair.
How is that fair?
'Cause I know my daughter and I know your chances are slim to none.
Okay but I know myself.
Okay let's bet 20 instead of 300.
20?? Do you think I'm 20?
I don't know how old you are.
I'm not 20. Let's keep it even at 300. And get me a drink please so I can celebrate my winnings.

Andrew walks over to Lola. We stay with Domino as she watches. From a distance we see Andrew talking and Lola not making eye contact. It's not going well. Then Andrew pulls up a chair next to her and says something that makes Lola smile. Domino is intrigued. Then Lola puts her headphones on and stands up and walks to the dance floor with Andrew. Domino is shocked. Andrew twirls Lola around as Domino's heart races for her kid.
INT. DANCE FLOOR - CONTINUOUS
How're you a better dancer than me?
I do not know if that is true.
"Crank That (Soulja Boy) [Clean]" comes on.
Do you know how to ~crank that~?

Lola pushes her headphones to her ears. All the kids who were just slow dancing are now thrilled about "Crank That" and are also still on the high of slow dancing. It's rowdy. Lola is looking like she might dip. Domino has walked over.
That was some of the best twirling I've ever seen!
I think I will go sit back down. You sure?
I do not know how to "crank that".
I can teach you.
Too much stimulation?
A bit too much, yes. I like here.

Lola is pacing a few steps off the dance floor ("here"). She's not just pacing though. She's also grooving. Like she's dancing every once in a while with just her arms. Then with just her legs. Like it's clear she still wants to dance.
Are you still grooving?
Andrew starts grooving subtly too with Lola. Then Domino starts. It's hella cute. Their own version of "crankin that".
INT. TABLE OF JEWISH PARENT-TEACHERS AND GRANDPA - CONTINUOUS
Cheeky Mom watches Andrew from afar, wheels turning. CHEEKY MOM This kid rocks.
He's adorable. He's even making me not hate Hoochie Slut. CHEEKY MOM Cathy that is not even close to appropriate.
She fucked my husband I can say whatever I want.
She did not fuck Todd. Why would she fuck Todd?
EXT. SPACE EVENTS LOT - NIGHT
Andrew opens the door for David and they walk to the car.
I can't believe I get to go to a party like that every weekend for a year... But I feel like it wouldn't have been fun if you weren't there.
I mean your feeling is right. But when I'm not there just don't be shy. You're a good dancer. Dance. Margaret was so smitten. Girls like good dancers. .. Boys do too...
Why do you think I'm gay?
I don't. I just think you can't say for certain you're straight until like junior year of college.
What happens junior year?
Hey! I thought you guys left.
Wouldn't leave without saying bye.
Lola do you know David? Yes.
Hi David.
LOLA
(to Andrew; feeling shy) We had Science together last year.

Well Andrew- Lola and I just wanted to say thanks for dancing with us. And- David I know I'll be seeing a lot more of you at all the parties, but Andrew I need your venmo because I realized I might not see you again.
Well I think we just have to see Andrew again. The Jewish PTA Mom Squad has suddenly appeared.
Oh my god. Ladies, please..
Laughter. While Andrew talks, we show Domino absorbing the PTA Mom Squad energy. One mom looks at Domino's tattoos. The other looks like she wants to be like, "Sup hussy."
I'm home for a bit so I'll take David to another Bar Mitzvah. CHEEKY MOM Well I'm glad to hear that because what's happening right now is you're being swarmed by Jewish mothers recruiting you to24
INT. MOM AND STEPDAD GREG'S BEDROOM - NIGHT
-BE THE KIDS' MOTIVATIONAL DANCER!!
Wait like the party starters!?? Yeah.
Nuh uh!!! Oh my gosh! Get out!
David and Mom are pumped on the bed. Andrew is being selfeffacing in the corner. Stepdad Greg is reading in bed.
They said he made sure every person had a perfect night and they want a "designated party orchestrator"MOM -Andrew that's so fun. You think? Yes!
MOM
I don't know, I wanna hear what
Greg thinks about it first.
Don't be mean stop this is so fun. You need to start a company.
Yeah I mean Subway sucks and I really enjoyed my night, so.
Well you wouldn't quit Subway; you'd just cut down your hours. Did they say how much you'd make? How much does a party starter get paid I wonder.
I think they said just under what an unhappy pharmaceutical executive makes.
(pissed) What are you talking about?
(serious) Honey. That's not funny-
INT. LOLA'S ROOM - NIGHT
Domino is scratching Lola's back. Lola is deep in thought.
Are you thinking about Andrew? No.
Hm. I guess I am.
I am thinking about feeding Jerry cauliflower and cucumber tomorrow.
Big day tomorrow Jerry.
Flash to Lola's HAMSTER (2).
I also have math homework tomorrow. It is assigned extra credit.
You mean 'offered' extra credit?
No, I mean 'assigned'.
What did he say to get you dancing?
Andrew said he would buy me a MoYu 13 by 13 Magic Cube with the 300 dollars you are going to give him.
Would he be a good sitter for you?
I do not do well with sitters, but I think it might be a bit different with Andrew. Why?
I like him and I think he would like Jerry. Also, I do not think he will treat me like a baby. Will Joseph be okay with you giving Andrew 300 dollars for the bet?
It's gonna come from the money I make substituting at your school.
... In 102 days what is his will be assigned to you and what is yours will be assigned to him.
EXT. CHEAT OUTSIDE MOM AND STEPDAD GREG'S HOME - NIGHT
Andrew angrily takes the trash out.
INT. ANDREW AND DAVID'S ROOM IN MOM AND GREG'S HOME - NIGHT26
Andrew is on a bed parallel to the one David and Mom are on.
I really can't live here-
You have to brush him off.
-Please don't say that.
Greg's a dick. He is-
-I know-that's why I'm gone as soon as I have money.
-I'm not okay with that language from you Dav-
(hurt by Andrew/annoyed by Mom) -Stop. What I was gonna say is he's a dick, but I put up with it 'cause he and Mom are good for each other. MOM That's right sugar.
How? No. Greg can shove it. Just because he's not as shitty as Dad doesn't mean you're good together. Are you happy? He makes you happy?

(beat; lets Andrew calm) I'm happy here... I don't have to worry about so many things because of Greg. He treats me with love even though you don't see it like that. I don't expect you to get it. -I'm done talking Greg. What's your business gonna be called? Corny music fades in.
"JIG CONDUCTOR" PROMOTIONAL VIDEO - Corny music plays as "Jig
Conductor" title cards fade in over insert shots of Andrew putting on a tux. Then David appears. "Jig Conductor's Brother" title cards fade in. David is nervous and stiff.
If anybody knows how to start a party, it's my brother, Andrew. Or should I say "The Jig Conductor."
INT. MOM AND STEPDAD GREG'S HOME - DAY
The video stops. We reveal that it was playing on Andrew's phone that Mom is holding (too close to her blind eyes). MOM Where'd it go?
That's all there is.
Well finish it.
Fuck no Mom if anybody sees that I'm gonna get put on a watch list. MOM It's cute! David is so cute.
Literally did you just watch what I watched? The camera hates him. He's stiff as a board.
It's okay if it's a little stiff.
I don't need a video. This isn't like that.
Like what? A job?
Yeah! I get paid, but I don't need to think of it as a job.
You do if you want it to be your job!
I don't! I just want it to get me enough money to live in Barcelona!
Where Maya is doing her Fulbright?
No! Yes! But also where I wanna be.
Sweetie. You didn't tell me that's what you wanted to do.
Well I didn't want to make you sad.
(knows that's not why) As long as you're doing what you want, I'll be very happy actually. I just wanna make sure you're doing what you want... Remember when your dad made you uncooked salmon?
Barcelona isn't uncooked salmon!
You knew it wasn't cooked but you still ate it!
He was so proud of it!
You vomited for 24 hours!
You can't just ~go~ with everythingANDREW -I'm not just going with Maya to Spain. It'd be a huge deal. It's a place I've always wanted to go.
I guess you just never mentioned it-Mmomm!
What!? I want to help! Stop! Stop!
Andrew's phone rings in Mom's hand.
That's the DJ trying to team up-WOAMom answers it, thinking that's what he wants.
(mouthing) What the fuck???
Hello? Hello?
You don't like him?
Hey! This is Andrew!
This is DJ Rich from Phoebe's. I've left a couple voicemails. You're not avoiding me are you?
Not successfully.
(laughing) Listen my man I heard you'll be
(mouthing) I'm gonna kill you. / I'm SORRY. SORRY.
workin a lot of the Newark Bar Mitzvahs. I want you to join my company. I liked
Andrew starts fake punching himself in the face.
working together. But you joining wouldn't mean we're together every
Andrew now does fake gut punches that lift him in the air.
night. We'll split up some. But most times we'd be together.
Well I hope we get hired together. But I'm doing a solo thing for now.
Are you starting a company?
Maybe I don't know yet.
... Well know I'd love for you to join mine. Even if you decide later
Andrew mimes pulling a grenade pin, then pops the grenade in his mouth. (His fake explosion will be our transition.)
you need help, I'm here... This is a good chunk of my living. And like I was supposed to work Ron's this weekend. Not tryna put pressure.
INT. SOCCER THEMED GRAND BANQUET HALL - EARLY NIGHT

The party is close to starting. Andrew takes a gulp from his water bottle labeled "vodka" and puts it back in his backpack next to his dinky makeshift DJ setup. It's being held up by the wall it's leaning against. RON'S MOTHER (50) comes up.
Hey are you okay with the schedule?
Is this not gonna fall over?
It's sturdy. Well not sturdy- it's being held up by the wall. But it won't fall over. I don't think.
I'm so excited for him.
Ron's Mother is suddenly tearing up.
Sorry. Emotional day.
Yeah your kid is a man.. So hey question though Mom: do we care about the hula hoop contest here? I'm down if Ron is into it but I'm
thinking maybe that's a last resort if nobody is having fun.
Ron won't care. I was actually the one who thought of it because they did a hula hoop contest at my Bat Mitzvah and I won and felt special.
.. Okay.. Well if you want to.. get some hula hooping in- -Hey Lola! Come here. Check out my DJ setup.
Andrew is talking to Lola, who's now walking up with Domino.
I'm gonna talk to Ron's father. I'm good with no hula hoop contest.
Okay great. -Hey friend.
Hi Andrew.
What's up PaRty Starter?
Actually going by "Jig Conductor".
That's really good.
Andrew goes in for a hug. Domino's dress is backless.
